textByHash.2ff4c9140f8a7f3440743601d2053f891aca9f86: The Dark Altar was the key to Xeric's power. Because of it, he was able to rule Kourend unopposed for nearly a hundred years. His reign was so dark, it became known as the Age of Strife.
textByHash.7f7dcad7c70886b3736daf3375805acd38f8bbfa: Once he was finally defeated, Xeric came to Quidamortem and built the Chambers of Xeric deep below the mountain.
textByHash.1ef07d57b1a8816d2c12ddd94dc43bdf3c358ddc: For many years we've tried to work out how he managed to survive out here without the power of the Dark Altar. Thanks to this cave, I think we've found the answer.
textByHash.5a895a69a8dc294e1b3bf7ee2dcc7f9ca9b3e991: This altar, it seems to give off the same power as the Dark Altar.
textByHash.5622f74e68a656ceade765a194fe7418dbd0b7bd: It appears to be manmade. I believe this altar was created to amplify the power of the Dark Altar, allowing it to reach areas it previously couldn't.
textByHash.e4379bc7fb057d41da24217fe011f63704518cf1: This discovery does bring about an intriguing question though.
textByHash.0df0f75cc7271b0e88f8bd0c572549d23969dba6: The altar here is still giving out power. That means Xeric could have potentially used it to live for hundreds of years after his defeat. It's long been believed that Xeric eventually died here, but what if he didn't?
textByHash.3c8583f1f817bd03bd61ae8444496b6c5f0ee959: Indeed. I'm going to stay here and continue working. Do you mind heading to the library to let them know what we've discovered.
textByHash.1f505614ed1bb6e63849dbe85103e9a6ecb92fa4: Hmm, I can see why he would take an interest. Very well, go let him know what we've found.
textByHash.c6736cee37d8c916472b6434d953c0d051f1c271: My name is Gnosi. I am here to assist the Varrock Museum in their research.
textByHash.39f3d3681fd3f0ddcc942956b4bf5fab1d4d8348: We're studying the history of the region, origins of the lizardmen and how it all connects to Xeric.
textByHash.ad6493e0b5a289b31f5493f6bf03b546951b91e8: We've wanted to study this place for a while, but haven't been able to explore due to lizardmen blocking the way.
textByHash.cd838b3830e84f76670ed032e0b84ab8bbdcdbca: But now that the Shayzien Army have cleared the path and discovered the Chambers of Xeric in the process, there is much to explore!
textByHash.2eca3a41a262f5708ed7c69ecbbbdc1146f86d45: Xeric was an incredibly powerful dark mage. He ruled Great Kourend for ten decades.
textByHash.067529d6db513daaa90de2c4e9ec9ff0b1899017: If you'd like to find out more you should visit the Historical Archive at the Grand Library.
textByHash.befa446e3d466d9492b9c65ec1de8ace6721364b: At the summit of this mountain we've found an ancient temple and a vast network of caves that we believe were formed by Xeric and his followers.
textByHash.2805191be7f931644006b344dce45ccdc65a1d96: The discovery of the Chambers tells us Xeric invested significant time and resources here, yet it was never documented.
textByHash.a1739ca9105ffa89ca6e5686e8a9bcc6945ac31b: While much of Kourend's history under Xeric remains unknown, it is very surprising to discover such a huge area that was previously undiscovered to us.
textByHash.56139eefba1e0b195e242340d17fab4377c3d3de: Of course, though be careful. The dangers of the Chambers of Xeric are as yet unknown. You should take a strong group of companions with you.
textByHash.f9b822c11d079db3a0596a9fd304cf4786e1b378: When he ruled Kourend, we know Xeric performed experiments on the living, using power drawn from the Dark Altar. After he was overthrown, he would have needed a new source of power.
textByHash.266e52a3a5c2981492053e27f57cdc273f158db8: We believe he came here to seek it. Xeric would also have required a source of many creatures for these experiments, and the Chambers certainly contain many of those!
textByHash.db6b40ffda695a05bc451d4c066c8b0153d64572: He must have also had some form of teleportation in order to reach the temple unnoticed.
textByHash.7016ecf0b859fcfc8b6beca6891424a4c207e49d: With time and careful study we will uncover these secrets and be able to answer these questions.
textByHash.9d253ed193a387bd66a0957bbf37a88896493651: We believe this altar is that source. It seems to act as an amplifier for the Dark Altar.
textByHash.e99e26f5d8d56f6fbd63d650421d3908a428d45c: As for what he used the Chambers for, that we still don't know. There's a lot of creatures in the Chambers. Maybe he used them in his experiments.
textByHash.4a4c916448ababfce578fdadfbddd37c4776d118: The discovery of this cave could change everything. We might finally be able to discover the link between the lizardmen, the Chambers of Xeric and Xeric himself.
